description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:18.04 Docker image. Define global variables GIT_DEPTH, SLEEP_A_BIT, VERBOSE and a before_script that runs ci/install-dependencies.sh. Add a test stage with nine jobs—clang-x86-nounwind, clang-x86_64-libdw, clang-x86_64-libunwind, clang-x86_64-nounwind, gcc-x86-nounwind, gcc-x86_64-libdw, gcc-x86_64-libdw-mainline, gcc-x86_64-libunwind, gcc-x86_64-nounwind—each runs ci/run-build-and-tests.sh and sets its own variables: CC (clang or gcc), STACKTRACE (no, libdw, libunwind), TARGET (x86 or x86_64), and for gcc-x86_64-libdw-mainline also KHEADERS set to torvalds/linux. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
